content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6-max

## Summary

Thorough review of sync/import safety rules implementation. The changes are well-structured and comprehensive: br_health.rs provides clean JSONL health checking with conflict marker detection and JSONL structural validation; br_process.rs adds sync_import, sync_if_dirty, ensure_synced with persistent mutation journal, file locking, and crash recovery; service.rs and success_reconciliation.rs add pre-operation health gates at every mutation point; project.rs adds recovered-flush replay with claim short-circuiting. All 950 tests pass, clippy is clean. The implementation covers all acceptance criteria. No critical bugs found. The sync_after_close skip-when-clean optimization is safe because the production caller always constructs BrMutationAdapter with a working directory.

## Amendments

None.
